$comment: Generic per-module reflection card. Authored once, applied to every module by the app. Optional; never gates progress. The app persists answers to localStorage and folds them into the exportable journal + final overview report.

prompts.label: What clicked?
prompts.placeholder: The idea, syntax, or moment that suddenly made sense.

prompts.label: What fought you?
prompts.placeholder: Where you got stuck, what took several tries, what still feels shaky.

prompts.label: What surprised you?
prompts.placeholder: Something unexpected — a gotcha, a design choice, a difference from a language you already know.

prompts.label: Coaching notes (paste anything worth keeping)
prompts.placeholder: Paste a snippet of the Socratic dialogue with your LLM that helped — or a realisation from it. This becomes part of your portfolio.
